problem.title: LINS on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does LINS perform on the second public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarsen the voxel maps and cap correspondences to favor throughput.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer voxel maps and more correspondences for a denser iterated Kalman update.
